items.author: shannon
items.snippet:

items.title: [imagine] The Layer 2 Zoo: Trust vs. Throughput in Two Dimensions
items.author: tufte
items.snippet:

items.title: [imagine] The Illusion of Distribution — Ethereum's Validator Map
items.author: buckminster-fuller
items.snippet:
